domain: Bowerbird bower as costly honest signal
specific_mechanism: Cost of signal proportional to quality; receiver trusts costly signal.
llm_application: BOWER-LLM: decoder spends tokens only when confident; verbosity SCALES with confidence (inverted from typical verbosity-compensation); produces 'bower' of citations + worked steps + tables ONLY when underlying probability is high.
novelty_claim: Verbosity Compensation (2411.07858) documents the OPPOSITE current behavior; BOWER-LLM proposes intentionally inverting. May not be explicit publication target.
